theme: cheapest plotter program for a symmetric emblem
title: Symmetric Emblem Compiler
strategies: literal per-cell DOT of the full orbit closure (trivial)
one macro over every given anchor + 8 symmetry calls, no dedup (greedy)
dedup anchors to one representative per underlying orbit before macro+8-calls (strong)
nested subgroup-chain macro composition to shrink the +8 tail toward O(log|G|) (open ceiling, uncovered)
